title: Alternative Approaches to Locating the Food and Nutrition Insecure Work in Progress in South India
abstract: This paper reports on the design of a multidisciplinary, collaborative project intended to make food and nutrition security systems more viable. The objective of the project is to identify 'alternative' indicators that can be used in food and nutrition monitoring and evaluation systems.

pdf_urls.filename: Alternative approaches to locating the food and nutrition insecure. work in progress in South India.pdf
